title: Senior / Accountant
description:
We are seeking Senior / Accountant to join our dynamic team. This role involves managing financial operations across Singapore and overseas entities, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and alignment with group standards. You will contribute to financial reporting, system optimization, and collaborate with internal teams to support informed decision-making and process improvements.


Accounting and Financial Reporting

  • Establish and maintain accounting standards for Singapore and overseas entities in compliance with local and international regulations.
  • Oversee full-spectrum accounting operations, including general ledger preparation, consolidation reports, and statutory filings.
  • Ensure timely and accurate financial reporting for both local and group requirements.

System Integration and Process Optimization

  • Assist in the integration of company accounts into the headquarters' accounting framework.
  • Collaborate with IT teams to implement and develop financial systems tailored to overseas operations.
  • Continuously optimize financial processes and regulations to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.

Compliance and Coordination

  • Manage local and overseas financial operations, including tax declarations and regulatory compliance.
  • Act as a liaison to ensure financial practices meet regulatory standards across jurisdictions.

Strategic Financial Support

  • Work closely with project teams to understand financial needs and provide data-driven support for analysis and decision-making.
  • Contribute to strategic planning and provide insights for business development through financial expertise.

Ad-Hoc Assignments

  • Handle additional duties or tasks as assigned by management.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting; experience in technology or other fast-paced industries is a plus.
  • Minimum 5 years of accounting experience, with exposure in both big 4 firms and in-house finance.
  • Candidates with more extensive experience will be considered for a Senior Accountant role.
  • Strong proficiency in financial tools and software, especially Excel and PowerPoint.
  • Bilingual proficiency in English and Mandarin to liaise with Chinese-speaking stakeholders.
  • Strong analytical and logical thinking, with excellent attention to detail.
  • Effective communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work across functions.
  • Self-motivated, resilient, and committed to continuous professional growth with clear career aspirations.
  • Familiarity with local and international financial reporting standards and tax compliance requirements.

postedCompany.description:
Our goal is to develop and bring top-quality casual games to our global player community. We aim to be a leading digital entertainment platform by consistently delivering high-quality products.  


At H2 Games, we value innovation, creativity, and humor. Our team believes that exceptional individuals create exceptional games. If you resonate with our values and would like to join and contribute to our growing team in a fast-paced creative environment.
